heading: Statement of appropriations; “usual number”
label: 725 Statement of appropriations; “usual number”
text: Of the statements of appropriations required to be prepared by , there shall be printed, after the close of each regular session of Congress, the usual number of copies.section 105 of Title 21So in original. See References in Text note below.1
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 153 (, ).Mar. 2, 1895, ch. 189, § 128 Stat. 958
